title: gleicheniastrum hecistophyllum
intro: Gleicheniastrum hecistophyllum, also known as the Golden Hairsword, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Gleicheniaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Gleicheniastrum hecistophyllum include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to have a range of health benefits when consumed.
